revision_note: Rewrote plan after discovery: TreeSitterScanner + all 7 grammars already exist. Work is promoting tree-sitter from opt-in to default, wiring JSCallDetector into tree-sitter path, and fixing worker parity bug.
plan_type_rationale: Two independent problems: (1) default path promotion for main scanner, (2) worker parity bug. Separate phases for clean commits and targeted testing.

phases.title: Promote tree-sitter to default + wire JSCallDetector into tree-sitter path

tasks.description: Read src/scanner/scanner.ts lines 1100-1300 — map the exact useTreeSitter check, fallback chain, and where JSCallDetector runs
tasks.success_criteria: Confirmed: tree-sitter path skips JSCallDetector; JSCallDetector only runs in useAST branch

tasks.description: Update src/scanner/scanner.ts: (a) set useTreeSitterMode default to true for all languages (ts, tsx, js, jsx, go, rs, java, cpp, c) — keep regex as fallback on throw; (b) wire JSCallDetector pass into tree-sitter path for ts/tsx/js/jsx files, attaching calls[] and imports[] the same way the useAST branch does today
tasks.success_criteria: useTreeSitter no longer needs to be passed — it activates by default; JSCallDetector still runs for TS/JS files in tree-sitter mode

tasks.description: Quick benchmark: node -e 'require child_process scanSync on src/ with and without useTreeSitter explicitly set' — record element counts before and after to confirm accuracy improved (more elements, fewer false positives)
tasks.success_criteria: Element counts plausibly improved or stable; no crash

tasks.description: feat(scanner): promote tree-sitter to default scanner path for TS/JS/Go/Rust/Java/C++ (IMP-CORE-052)
Read src/scanner/scanner-worker.ts lines 58-90 — confirm worker useAST branch uses only JSCallDetector (missing ASTElementScanner), and has no tree-sitter path at all
tasks.success_criteria: Confirmed: worker TS path is JSCallDetector-only; missing ASTElementScanner; no tree-sitter path

tasks.description: Update src/scanner/scanner-worker.ts: (a) fix useAST TS branch to use ASTElementScanner (TypeScript compiler API) + JSCallDetector, same as main thread; (b) add useTreeSitter branch mirroring the updated main scanner path
tasks.success_criteria: Worker TS path: ASTElementScanner for structure + JSCallDetector for calls (matching main thread); tree-sitter path added

tasks.description: npx vitest --run __tests__/scanner/parallel-processing.test.ts — confirm no regressions in parallel path tests
fix(scanner-worker): match main thread AST+tree-sitter accuracy for TS/JS path (IMP-CORE-078)

acceptance_criteria: useTreeSitter is true by default for ts, tsx, js, jsx, go, rs, java, cpp, c — no flag required
JSCallDetector still runs for TS/JS files after tree-sitter structural pass — calls[] and imports[] populated
Regex fallback active when tree-sitter throws
Worker TS path uses ASTElementScanner + JSCallDetector (matching main thread)
